'''鈭歫-k-r-r''' ('''kajakreroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:waile|waile]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-k-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waile|waile]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-k-r-r
|-
! Lemma
| kajakreroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijakreroko|thijakreroko]] || [[word:jijakreroko|jijakreroko]] || [[word:shijakreroko|shijakreroko]] || [[word:kijakreroko|kijakreroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujakreroko|thuthujakreroko]] || [[word:jujujakreroko|jujujakreroko]] || [[word:shushujakreroko|shushujakreroko]] || [[word:kukujakreroko|kukujakreroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujakreroko|thujakreroko]] || [[word:jujakreroko|jujakreroko]] || [[word:shujakreroko|shujakreroko]] || [[word:kujakreroko|kujakreroko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojakreroko|thojakreroko]] || [[word:jojakreroko|jojakreroko]] || [[word:shojakreroko|shojakreroko]] || [[word:kojakreroko|kojakreroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojakreroko|thojakreroko]] || [[word:jojakreroko|jojakreroko]] || [[word:shojakreroko|shojakreroko]] || [[word:kojakreroko|kojakreroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jakreroko|th忙jakreroko]] || [[word:j忙jakreroko|j忙jakreroko]] || [[word:sh忙jakreroko|sh忙jakreroko]] || [[word:k忙jakreroko|k忙jakreroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajakreroko|thathajakreroko]] || [[word:jajajakreroko|jajajakreroko]] || [[word:shashajakreroko|shashajakreroko]] || [[word:kakajakreroko|kakajakreroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajakreroko|thajakreroko]] || [[word:jajakreroko|jajakreroko]] || [[word:shajakreroko|shajakreroko]] || [[word:kajakreroko|kajakreroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajakreroko|thajakreroko]] || [[word:jajakreroko|jajakreroko]] || [[word:shajakreroko|shajakreroko]] || [[word:kajakreroko|kajakreroko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
